detail.instructions: Keep the borrowed log entry and view code, then add LogLevel variants Info, Warn, and Error. Implement alert_priority with a match on level.

hints.body: Enums pair well with match because every known case can be handled directly.
The alert_priority function should return 0 for Info, 1 for Warn, and 2 for Error.
A match expression is clearer than string comparisons for typed log levels.

detail.completionExplanation: Pattern matching keeps the alert queue policy exhaustive and visible. Adding a new log level later will naturally point maintainers at this decision.
